  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Which scope should the review take? Please choose one: (A) Content-focused technical review (thesis/gap, logic, novelty vs cited work, and citation/scholarship) with only light wording notes; (B) Copyediting-only pass (sentence-level clarity/grammar) with no technical critique; or (C) Both to equal depth.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "A review of this introduction-style section should assess how clearly the thesis, contribution, and gap are framed at a conceptual level.",
    "R1.2": "It is important to check the internal logic that connects background, prior work, and the stated contributions and results.",
    "R1.4": "The section makes a novelty claim relative to named graph-based and compression methods, so assessing delta vs nearest prior work is central.",
    "R1.7": "Because the text cites specific works and claims positioning, verifying citation accuracy and coverage is a core part of the review.",
    "RX.1": "The review must transparently note uncertainties and limits given only a single section and no access to experimental details.",
    "RX.2": "The review should avoid endorsing or amplifying overclaims beyond what the provided text justifies.",
    "RX.3": "The work must stay scoped to reviewing this section rather than the full paper or running new evaluations.",
    "RX.4": "Care is needed to avoid misattribution or statements that could unfairly harm or misrepresent prior work or deployment guidance.",
    "RX.5": "Any judgments should be traceable to specific sentences and claims within the provided text and cited sources."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which scope should the review take? Please choose one: (A) Content-focused technical review (thesis/gap, logic, novelty vs cited work, and citation/scholarship) with only light wording notes; (B) Copyediting-only pass (sentence-level clarity/grammar) with no technical critique; or (C) Both to equal depth.

rationale.R1.1: A review of this introduction-style section should assess how clearly the thesis, contribution, and gap are framed at a conceptual level.
rationale.R1.2: It is important to check the internal logic that connects background, prior work, and the stated contributions and results.
rationale.R1.4: The section makes a novelty claim relative to named graph-based and compression methods, so assessing delta vs nearest prior work is central.
rationale.R1.7: Because the text cites specific works and claims positioning, verifying citation accuracy and coverage is a core part of the review.
rationale.RX.1: The review must transparently note uncertainties and limits given only a single section and no access to experimental details.
rationale.RX.2: The review should avoid endorsing or amplifying overclaims beyond what the provided text justifies.
rationale.RX.3: The work must stay scoped to reviewing this section rather than the full paper or running new evaluations.
rationale.RX.4: Care is needed to avoid misattribution or statements that could unfairly harm or misrepresent prior work or deployment guidance.
rationale.RX.5: Any judgments should be traceable to specific sentences and claims within the provided text and cited sources.
